user_message: [AUTOMATION TRIGGER] Scheduled Calendar event with non-Microsoft external attendee detected initiated for Consolidated Messenger.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Sarah Singh <sarah.singh@consolidated.com>
To: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-24 14:46 EST
Subject: Quarterly Update: Consolidated Messenger competitive positioning

Our team encountered some challenges with competitive positioning. Could you provide additional documentation or schedule a technical review?

---
From: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
To: Sarah Singh <sarah.singh@consolidated.com>
Date: 2024-02-27 14:35 EST
Subject: Follow-up: competitive positioning Review

Just checking in on the competitive positioning proposal. Our DevOps Lead is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

---
From: Sarah Singh <sarah.singh@consolidated.com>
To: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-15 10:09 EST
Subject: Follow-up: competitive positioning Review

Our team encountered some challenges with competitive positioning. Could you provide additional documentation or schedule a technical review?

Meeting: competitive positioning Discussion - Consolidated Messenger
Date: 2024-02-26
Duration: 45 minutes
Attendees: Sarah Singh (Consolidated Messenger), Tom Rodriguez (Microsoft)

[00:02:00] Sarah Singh (Consolidated Messenger): Good morning. I wanted to follow up on competitive positioning from our last session.

[00:08:00] Sarah Singh (Consolidated Messenger): Our director reviewed this and has concerns about cost optimization. Can we address those?

[00:13:00] Sarah Singh (Consolidated Messenger): Our CTO reviewed this and has concerns about technical validation. Can we address those?

[00:15:00] Tom Rodriguez (Microsoft): Our CTO reviewed this and has concerns about data residency. Can we address those?

[00:18:00] Sarah Singh (Consolidated Messenger): On the competitive positioning front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around partner engagement.

[00:21:00] Sarah Singh (Consolidated Messenger): Our architect reviewed this and has concerns about technical validation. Can we address those?

[00:25:00] Sarah Singh (Consolidated Messenger): The timeline for budget approval is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:27:00] Tom Rodriguez (Microsoft): The timeline for stakeholder alignment is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:30:00] Sarah Singh (Consolidated Messenger): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is performance requirements.

[00:35:00] Sarah Singh (Consolidated Messenger): The timeline for partner engagement is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:40:00] Tom Rodriguez (Microsoft): Let me add some context -- we've been working on performance requirements and found that the existing infrastructure won't support the target workload without upgrades.
